description: Single source-of-truth regex patterns for Pre-Review Data Readiness enforcement. Consumed by post-propose-manual-review-check.sh (via jq) and vendor/scripts/review-gui.mts (via import). v1.2.3: INTERNAL_JARGON_LEAKAGE expanded — add `actual` / `Open Questions` / `Decision N` 起草修辭詞 alternation (TDMS 2026-05-19 incident: warehouse-items-tool-aggregation #5.2 description leaked `Resolved Questions actual total_quantity` jargon, user 抱怨 review GUI 看不懂). v1.2.2: both consumers strip `(verified-*: ...)` annotations + trailing markers (@followup / @no-screenshot / @no-manual-review-check) before applying primary regex — jargon / multi-step / abstract-reference in verified evidence reflects DOM truth at verify time and MUST NOT trigger pattern hits.

patterns.description: 模糊指代詞命中（per manual-review.md Pre-Review Data Readiness）— item description 使用「某張」「某筆」「任一」等抽象指代，未 inline 具體 sample identifier
patterns.regex: 某張|某筆|某個|任一張|任一筆|隨便一張|找一張|挑一筆|找某筆|現有的一筆|適合的一筆|\bany [A-Z]|\bsome [A-Z]|\ba record\b|\bpick one\b|\bfind a [A-Za-z]+\b|\ban existing one\b
patterns.remediation: Replace abstract reference with specific sample identifier (PK, UUID, business key, NFC UID) from docs/FIXTURES.md and ensure the sample is persisted in supabase/seed.sql under ## N. Fixtures / Seed Plan.

patterns.description: 描述提及 NFC / 刷卡 / 員工卡 / staff UID / card UID，但同一 item 內無具體 UID inline（parent block 含 sibling sub-items；sub-item 自身不獨立 fire）
patterns.anchor: manual-review.md#實體裝置--規格外輸入的替代路徑
patterns.remediation: Inline the specific card UID from docs/FIXTURES.md (4-byte UID like 04A1B2C3, or 7-byte UID like 04469C0FCB2A81, or stable seed key like TDMS-SEED-* / TEST-*); ensure the card is seeded persistently. For dev override path, reference the env-gated `Dev: card UID` input or `/__dev/scan?uid=...` endpoint. The UID MUST appear in the item description with explicit context (e.g., `card_uid=04A1B2C3`, UID `04A1B2C3`, or `04469C0FCB2A81`).

patterns.description: [review:ui] / [verify:ui] item group 內無任一 URL（http:// / https:// / /xxx path）— 只說『kiosk 頁』『dashboard』『設定頁』不算。Group = parent #N + 所有 #N.M sub-items；任一行含 URL 即整 group satisfied（cover Case A: parent 無 URL + sub-item 有；Case B: continuation sub-item「接續 #N.1 環境」靠 sibling URL）
patterns.remediation: Add a specific URL (e.g., http://localhost:8787/kiosk/workstation or /admin/kiosk-tokens?card_uid=...) somewhere in the item group (parent line OR any scoped sub-item) so the reviewer can navigate directly. Continuation sub-items that share the sibling's URL context (e.g., 「接續 #1.1 環境，輸入 ...」) automatically satisfy the rule. Generic labels like『kiosk page』『dashboard』『設定頁』are insufficient.

patterns.description: parent item line 含 ≥ 2 個串接動詞（→ chain 或重複的『然後』『接著』），但未拆 #N.M scoped sub-items
patterns.remediation: Split the flow chain into #N.M scoped sub-items (one atomic action per line: open X → input Y → click Z → confirm W). Each sub-item must include a falsifiable observation (specific toast text, badge state, route change, field value).

patterns.description: [review:ui] / [verify:ui] item 描述洩漏 spec internal jargon（DB 欄位名 / capability flag / spec template heading / 表名 / 起草修辭詞）— 違反「UI 元素 MUST 用使用者可見文字指代」hard rule，user/QA 不該被迫讀資料庫 schema 或 spec 起草內部用語
patterns.remediation: Replace internal jargon with user-facing description matching what user sees on screen. 替代用詞範例（→ 後是建議中文）：`Resolved Questions` / `Open Questions` / `Decision N` → 刪掉（spec 起草階段內部 heading，user 不該看到）；`actual` → 「實際」（user-facing 文案使用「實際庫存」「實際使用中」而非英文 `actual ...`）；`total_quantity` → 「總數量」/「庫存總和」；`has_vending_location` → 「在取料機已上架」；`ok_rate` → 「合格率」/「OK 率」；`ng_count` → 「不合格數」/「NG 數量」；`total_count` → 「總筆數」；`weekly_target` → 「週目標」/「週產量目標」；`responsibility_total` → 「責任總額」；`tool_change_score` → 「換刀分數」；`form_data` → 「表單內容」/「表單欄位值」；`form_type` → 「表單類型」；`line_member` → 「LINE 會員」/「LINE 好友紀錄」；`work_report` → 「工作報告」。Per manual-review.data-readiness.md「UI 元素 MUST 用使用者可見文字指代」hard rule，**禁止**用 codebase 內部識別符（DB 欄位名 / capability flag / API endpoint name / fixture id / spec template heading / 表名）或 spec 起草修辭詞（`Resolved Questions` / `Decision N` / `actual` 等）寫 user-facing item。需 cross-reference schema-level concept 時用 backtick + 中文 gloss 形式（例「取料機位置 (`vending_location`)」）。Sample inline（例 `weekly_target=5000`）會命中（POSIX ERE 不支 negative lookahead）— 加 `@no-manual-review-check[sample inline]` 繞開或重寫成「`inspection_standards.id` = 2179」分離格式。新增禁詞由 audit signal 命中後 user-curated 加入。

patterns.description: [review:ui] item 描述含 HTTP method + /api path 或 → status code（明顯為 backend round-trip）— 違反 [review:ui] 收斂原則 hard rule，MUST 改 [verify:api] / [verify:e2e] / [verify:api+ui]
patterns.remediation: HTTP method + path 或 → status code 是定義上的 agent-verifiable evidence（curl / ofetch / Playwright 可重現）。把這類 backend round-trip 標 [review:ui] 等於把該由 agent 自驗的工作丟回 user，違反 propose 階段對 user 時間的尊重。Replace `[review:ui]` with: (a) `[verify:api]` for pure HTTP round-trip（主線跑 curl，寫 (verified-api: <ISO> <METHOD> <URL> <STATUS>) annotation）, (b) `[verify:e2e]` for persistence / multi-role journey requiring Playwright spec, (c) `[verify:api+ui]` for mutation + final-state visual confirmation. See manual-review.md「[review:ui] 收斂原則 hard rule」+「Kind 分類指引」反面範例。

rules: Trailing token on a ## 人工檢查 checkbox line
<reason> MUST be non-empty (empty brackets or bare marker without brackets are invalid and ignored)
Canonical ordering with other trailing markers: @followup[TD-NNN] @no-manual-review-check[<reason>] @no-screenshot
Hook and review-gui both skip pattern evaluation for marked items but emit info-level log naming the reason
